criteria_checked.note: 2>&1 mis-segments to ['echo x 2>','1']; dangling empty target -> ask; :251 fd-dup drop dead. Confirmed at :143,:230,:251.
REFUTED: split guard alone orphans the following FILE token -> fail-open B1.
PARTIALLY REFUTED: /dev/fd/ prefix admits /dev/fd/../../etc/passwd -> fail-open B2.
single ask funnel :423-426; flips W4; python-c/$() still deny (if-ambiguous precedes final allow).
802/3/3 unchanged (bash-radius uncounted); no test pins count or '3 ask'.
pre-tool-guard.sh:190 + dmc-codex-pretooluse.py:71 are translation branches, not assertions.
ENFORCEMENT_MATRIX:108 + bin/dmc:68 in-scope; DMC.md ask sentences truthful; FABLE_WORKFLOW_TRANSFER.md:142 out of scope.
bin/dmc:68 verb help emits '3 ask' -> truthful-lockstep edit.
INVALID as written: B1/B2 open fail-opens so the diff is not strictly-tighter; valid only after fixes.

blockers.statement: CRITICAL fail-open: the split guard makes >&/N>& cohere; _redirect_targets extracts & (dropped as fd-dup at :251) and orphans the following FILE token, so echo pwned >& src/other.py and cmd >& /tmp/evil (real out-of-scope writes) classify ALLOW-NO-WRITE (reproduced raw_targets=[]). Fix: parse >&/N>& whose operand is not a bare fd-number/- as an adjudicated file write target.
HIGH fail-open: safe-sink /dev/fd/ prefix (startswith) admits /dev/fd/../../etc/passwd -> ALLOW. Fix: anchor ^/dev/fd/[0-9]+$; keep /dev/null|/dev/stderr|/dev/stdout as exact-set membership.
blockers.evidence_ref: Rev1 plan lines 111-115,218; startswith admits traversal

blockers.statement: MEDIUM test-adequacy: the matrix omits the >&FILE/&>FILE/N>&FILE and /dev/fd/ traversal negative controls, and the standalone install test is not CI-wired (dmc-ci.yml invokes no install/ test). The fail-open negative controls + NO-ASK invariant + L0 git-apply-2>&1 regression must live in the module selftest() (CI path).
